notes: W5.3 regression check. Fresh CDP Page.navigate to https://www.notion.com/chat -> redirected to https://www.notion.so/chat, then TWO cache-bypass hard reloads (Page.reload ignoreCache=true) with hydration waits (nav 6s+20s poll, reload1 8s+20s poll, reload2 8s+25s poll). All loads landed on a NORMAL Notion page: window <title>='Notion AI | Notion' (NOT '보안 정책 - 접근 차단'), no 차단 / 보안 정책 / 민감 text anywhere in DOM (hasBlock=false, hasPolicy=false, hasSensitive=false, titleHasBlock=false). The page-LOAD whole-page block did NOT fire. DOM probe byte-identical across nav + both reloads: bodyLen=9, snippet='콘텐츠로 건너뛰기' (skip-to-content; reload1 transiently showed '불러오는 중...' loading then collapsed back to 9), editorCount=0, editorFound=false. The chat composer NEVER hydrated (no contenteditable/textarea), so the PII prompt could NOT be typed or submitted (submitted=false); no user-message bubble, no engine response, no '차단' warning surfaced (msgCount=0). path=composer_never_hydrated. This matches the TRUE notion baseline FAIL_NOT_RENDERED — the chronic record-map-injection / FE-hydration-stall failure family (#1139/#1148/#1165/#1183/#1184/#1212/#1233/#1254/#1297/#1319/#1340). Reproduces #1297 (W5.0), #1319 (W5.1), #1340 (W5.2) EXACTLY. W5.3 (wrtn/character -> DB-driven emit_ws_envelope, ws_socketio id=88, 3-frame split-wrap codec) introduces NO observable change vs the true baseline on notion. notion is NOT the key W5.3 validator (that is wrtn/character on ws_socketio); notion's chronic hydration stall makes it a non-discriminating indicator that never exercises the engine WS path. NOT a regression: the engine ws_socketio migration cannot affect notion because the notion composer never hydrates and no chat round-trip ever begins (engine_intercept_fired=no; page NOT replaced; no engine response in DOM). Identical outcome class to W5.2 baseline as expected.
